Services.title: B2B Engineering Services
Services.comment: // Available for freelance contracts, architectural consultations & SaaS builds...
Services.subtitle: Officially licensed in Abu Dhabi. I deliver end-to-end, production-grade systems — not prototypes.
Services.license_note: 🔐  Official Software Development Freelance License · Abu Dhabi, UAE
Services.s1_desc: Design and build rock-solid, high-concurrency backend systems. From API design and microservices decoupling to database optimisation and zero-trust security patterns — I architect systems that scale under real load.
Services.s2_desc: Full-stack SaaS development with clean tenant isolation, role-based access control, subscription logic, and containerised deployment. TypeScript frontend + Python or Node.js backend, ready for production.
Services.s3_desc: Self-hosted n8n orchestration, Python automation scripts, and omnichannel API integrations. I build intelligent workflow pipelines that eliminate manual overhead and connect your tools in real time.
Services.s4_desc: Implementation of AES/ECC hybrid encryption, steganographic data protection, RBAC policy design, and zero-trust architecture reviews. I build systems where security is a first-class citizen from day one.
Services.banner_sub: // Available for B2B contracts, retainers, and technical partnerships.

Philosophy.title: Engineering Philosophy
Philosophy.p1_2: — Independent Full-Stack & Backend Architect and CTO @ Mulham AI. I specialise in building highly scalable systems and secure cryptography projects designed to handle real-world production loads.
Philosophy.p2: Armed with an official Software Development Freelance License in Abu Dhabi and credentials as an ALX Software Engineering and AI Career Essentials graduate, my approach is practical: decouple systems, implement zero-trust security from day one, and write maintainable code that scales effortlessly. Whether it's processing real-time AI pipelines, building AES/ECC hybrid encryption with steganography, or orchestrating omnichannel automations via n8n — I build software engineered for heavy loads.
Philosophy.quote: "Architecture is not about the code you write, but about the systems you enable — invisible engines that power everything above them."
Philosophy.val1_desc: From cryptographic vaults to AI workflow orchestration — complete, deployable products.
Philosophy.val2_desc: Decoupled logic, containerised deployments, and database-first optimisation.
Philosophy.val3_desc: Zero-trust, AES/ECC encryption, RBAC, and steganographic data protection.

FeaturedMissions.ciphervault_desc: Built a hybrid security system combining AES + ECC cryptography with steganography for multilayer data protection. Encrypts content and hides it inside media to improve confidentiality.
FeaturedMissions.tanseeq_desc: Developed a TypeScript-first application focused on delivering a clean, maintainable app architecture and modern frontend workflows.
FeaturedMissions.mulhamai_desc: Implemented and managed an AI-focused application, centering on practical intelligent features, API-driven AI integration patterns, and high-availability deployments.
FeaturedMissions.mithaq_desc: Engineered a full-stack split architecture for a SaaS platform. Built a TypeScript-heavy structured frontend and a Python backend service layer with automation support and containerised deployment readiness.
FeaturedMissions.linkedpro_desc: Created a robust Python-based automation tool for LinkedIn workflows to streamline repetitive professional tasks and optimise processes.
